lines.text: There was a time when the currents swept us into the jaws of uncharted waters, where relentless storms and voracious waves awaited. But after weathering such trials, they revealed to us a hidden gem—the Shores themselves.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: My family has always been drawn to the thrill of a new voyage. One stormy night, fate decided to play a hand. What we discovered there on that island, the technology and novel ideas, was nothing short of a blessing in disguise.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: There exists only one relatively safe route from the Black Shores to Ragunna—a path known solely to the Montelli family. As long as you stayed on this course, you were bound to encounter the troupe.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Exactly. When we heard the Black Shores were hunting for a legitimate entry into Ragunna, I thought, why not bring them into our little venture? Hence, the invitation.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Our intentions might not be as grandiose or ominous as you think. We seek liberation, and to achieve it, we're pursuing the truth behind Rinascita's origins.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Legend has it that when people first arrived on this island, <ano=The first beacon in Rinascita>Genesis Nexus</ano> was already here, welcoming them.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: The prevailing belief is that the Sentinel gifted us this technology, and despite nobody ever seeing the Sentinel in person, we talk with Them through supposed "telepathy." Notice anything strange about that story?
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Terminals conjure up Echoes, and the Genesis Nexus allows the Ragunnesi access to Common Echoes.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: If the Genesis Nexus was present when the first settlers arrived, who built it?
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: And really, if no one's ever laid eyes on the Sentinel, how can we be so sure that statue really represents Them?
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: It seems to me the Order might have spun us a tale, hiding the true origins behind their grand myths.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: No, we have no ambitions to rule or to renounce our faith. And really, this city should not be ruled by any one entity.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: The hour grows late. I have arranged accommodations for you at Palazzo Agrotta in the south. Let us walk there together, and I can share a story along the way.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Think of it as a bedtime tale. I learned it from the troupe. It is about Fleurdelys, the Blessed Maiden.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: The people of this island came from diverse civilizations now lost to time, but through plays and tradition, they sought to preserve memories of their heritage.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: In the past, while the clash of cultures led to conflict, the Ragunnesi united through faith, restoring balance, even if precarious.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: To maintain this unity, we have always needed both a Sentinel and a "play" based on a shared legend that gives us roles.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Yet, this play has endured for so long that we have become defined by our roles—noble, commoner, believer, merchant. What was meant to unite us now stifles us.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Now, we yearn for a day when we can truly set aside our titles and positions, express our true selves, and join together in celebration...
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Yes, born from hope and idealism, it reminds the Ragunnesi of our initial vision of equality and freedom. It also affirms our true worth.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: While the Order's true intentions remain unclear, we are certain their influence has already eroded the very foundations of our society.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: People revere the divine figure the Order has constructed, yet they also live in fear of punishment.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Legends become accomplices in fostering ignorance, and faith becomes the loyal executioner of cruel punishment. An invisible cage has trapped us all...
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Speaking of freedom within a cage is absurd. Fear and ignorance are our foremost enemies.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: This year's Carnevale will spark a flame fierce enough to burn down that cage.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Rest well, and tomorrow, we shall take the stage together at the Carnevale.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Good night. May your dreams be sweet.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Once, the Blessed Maiden was just a simple peasant girl. During the Sentinel's Gratitude Rite, the young Fleurdelys managed to sneak past the guards and drink the sacramental wine—every drop.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Perhaps it was the intoxicating wine in Egla Town or simply her lack of experience with spirits, but she soon found herself quite drunk.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Swaying on her feet, she ascended the ceremony's grand platform, lifted her threadbare dress, and began a rather ungainly dance.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Seizing the sacred horn, she played a carefree folk tune, dodging the guards and weaving through the crowd with surprising agility.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Remarkably, the crowd, as if drawn by an unseen force, followed her lead, transforming the solemn ceremony into a wild parade of cheers and revelry.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Naturally, the Order was less than pleased. The Pilgrim's Sail did not yet exist, so Fleurdelys faced three days of confinement. During that time, she used her prison walls as a canvas.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: That unforgettable day of disordered revelry left a lasting mark on all who witnessed it.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Is it not remarkable? A rebellious girl, chosen by the Sentinel to become the Blessed Maiden.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: If the Sentinel indeed permitted such a girl to serve as Their spokesperson, it suggests that all this joyous revelry is not something They disdain.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Perhaps They too enjoy poetry, painting, tears, laughter, romantic tales of knights, and dancing amidst crowds—much like ourselves.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Oh, let him enjoy himself. The taste of victory is still fresh, and after such a battle, we should celebrate to the fullest!
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Drink your fill, everyone! This round's on me!
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: The Montelli family is known for its hospitality, but freeloaders... will not find us so welcoming.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Come, let's discuss the information we've gathered so far.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: During the Carnevale, you heard the Sentinel's voice and found a girl named Cartethyia. We've dug up some information on her.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: In the Order, every high-ranking Acolyte is given a new name.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: We contacted the Acolyte, Phoebe. After some digging in the Order's records, she confirmed that before taking on her holy title, the Blessed Fleurdelys was called... Cartethyia.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: But the Blessed Maiden... she martyred herself twenty years ago...
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: The family will uncover the truth. The only remaining clue is the "inverted tower" you mentioned hearing about from the Sentinel, but even that feels elusive...
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Do you recall what we learned from the stained glass in the Tower Ruins? There were two divinities at the dawn of Rinascita.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: If one refers to the Sentinel, then the other, who could stand alongside Them, might be the Threnodian.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: The two are undoubtedly linked, so uncovering one could lead us to the other.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Remember Gilberto, from the Fisalia family? It took a lot to get him to talk, but we finally got some information from him.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: As he tells it, the Fisalia family's long-revered deity is none other than... Leviathan, the Threnodian from the sea's depths.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: It's hard to believe, I know. But recent events have only reinforced what we discovered from the stained glass.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: We will attempt to establish contact with the Fisalias to build an alliance and gather more intelligence.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Rest assured, negotiation is what we do best. If necessary, we'll present them with an offer they can't refuse.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Remember, you're not alone. If anything happens, just let us know.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Ah, you're here.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: For the Ragunnesi, the Carnevale has always been an occasion to revel with abandon. It's what they truly desire.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: All seems well for the moment.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: The family is prepared. They'll support our plan should the need arise.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: We must remain vigilant. The Fractsidus may be lurking, observing our every move.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: It's nearly time. The troupe should be arriving at the harbor shortly.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: How do you feel? Ready to step into the spotlight?
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Excellent. We have the skills. Now it's all about improvisation.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: It's only natural. It's your first show. If it helps, I'm a bit nervous myself. Let's consider it a rehearsal, shall we? There are grander stages yet to come.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Then let's cast aside all inhibitions and dance to the rhythm of this grand celebration!
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: I'll be waiting here for you.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: As anticipated, the Fractsidus is on the move.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: The curtain has been lifted. We can't keep our audience waiting.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Exercise caution. New enemies have appeared.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Watch out!
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: At last, the crisis has been resolved.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Are you alright, {PlayerName}? Some family members mentioned you were speaking to a wall… I'm worried you might still be under Phrolova's spell.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: See who? Are you truly alright?
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Cartethyia… I'll make a note of it.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: If she was indeed here, she is likely still in Ragunna. I will have my family start searching.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: You're right.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Cartethyia... I will have my family find out more about her.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: If we find out anything, I'll contact you, and we can discuss our next steps together.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Until then, as you suggested…
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Let's keep this Carnevale going.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: At last, the crisis has been resolved.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Allow me to properly introduce myself. My name is Carlotta, Carlotta Montelli.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: The second daughter of the Montelli Family, yes. Please feel free to call me Carlotta.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Also, I trust the renumeration meets your satisfaction, Ms. Zani?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Surely a distinguished guest such as {PlayerName} deserves the attention of our most trusted employee.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: I'm aware of your purpose here. On behalf of my family, allow me to extend our deepest gratitude for your endeavors.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Your eyes show curiosity about me and my role in this… drama. However, this isn't the place for such discussions. Please follow me.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Make it quick and clean.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Ms. Zani, do you mind handling the cleanup? I'm sorry. I just promised you a vacation... but looks like it will have to wait.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: There's more to this attack than it seems.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Yes. At this juncture, neither the Fractsidus nor the Fisalias have any reason to interfere. It's some hidden truth about the Order the Sentinel is leading us towards.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: The traitors must be watching us, knowing truth is on the verge of revelation.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: I have a feeling that whatever's coming next… will not be easy.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: This is where my family first found the Vitreum Dancer.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: What do you see in the shattered stained glass?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: This seems to chronicle a legend of the Sentinel and the tale of how the first Primus founded the Order.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: I've learned of this history before but many details have faded over time.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Well, art investment is one of our family's key ventures, so I've naturally picked up a thing or two along the way.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: There is a stone tablet over there. It might offer some clues about these stained glass images.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: It's done. Now let's see…
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Looks like these stained glass images recount a tale about the Divinity. Wait...
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: It's just... the content is rather peculiar. I'll translate it for you.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Rinascita has two divinities? I've never heard of such a thing.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: The Montelli family archives hold many documents on Rinascita's past, yet none mentioned two divinities.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: In Ragunna, the common belief has always been that Sentinel Imperator is the only divinity of Rinascita.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: But if the images on the stained glass windows were fabricated, why would the Order deface them and declare this tower forbidden?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: If this is indeed the Order's doing... we must leave here immediately.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: North of this tower is an island.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: It should be beyond their reach. Once we get there, you will discover another truth the Order has buried—
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: …Interesting, they're here even faster than I anticipated.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Keep it safe. I'll handle the rest.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Speak, who gave you the order?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Look at what you have done, distorting history, usurping the Sentinel's authority, and... colluding with wretches.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Who are your accomplices? The Fractsidus, the Fisalias, and even some of the Montellis, am I right?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: So this is how you treat those truth-seekers? Banish them in the name of pilgrimage?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Of course, if Lord Fenrico is the true "Enlightened One."
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: However, the prophecy speaks of a maiden as the "Enlightened One." Is that why you destroyed the stained glass? To pass Fenrico off as the Enlightened One? So he can seize the Sentinel's power and rule Ragunna?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: How… that's… Uncle Capollo's pendant? What did you do to him!
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: …My actions? What do you want me to do?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: I'm sorry. Even though the time we shared was… very memorable.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Farewell, and may you meet your friends… where it all ends.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: There is a saying in Ragunna, even the finest bullet can miss. It was only a mistake.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: What matter of intrigue brought you and {PlayerName} together at this hour, Uncle? A table... are we speaking of a splendid card game, then?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Pity. I didn't think you'd pull {Male=him;Female=her} aside for a private word, especially after all Rover and I have been through together.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: But since you've finished, would you excuse us now?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Meet me at the <color=yellow>rendezvous</color>. Beware the "eyes."
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I understand, Uncle. I've never forgotten where my privileges come from, nor will I covet what's not mine.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The Black Shores, the Carnevale... my sole principle is whether they benefit the Montellis.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I will execute any command that strengthens the family, and crush any threats to our standing.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Uncle, about Benett... have you heard?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Not at all, I just happened to overhear someone talking about it in passing...
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: "Glory in Decay," the impressionist Pasoli's latest piece... Didn't know you had such refined taste.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I dodged those pesky "eyes" the whole way here, worried you'd been kept waiting too long. But it seems you've kept yourself entertained.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: So the old gentleman was simply hiding from the rain, was he? I see... The Montelli Quarter does attract art enthusiasts. Anyway, I'm glad prying eyes didn't follow.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: When it rains in Ragunna, surprises are as common as puddles. A delay is only a small splash.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Calling you here with little explanation and a word of caution... I can only imagine your confusion.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The Montelli's path is not always paved with roses, but with thorns as well. As the heir apparent, my uncle bears many burdens.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Seeing me work with you on the Carnevale under Grandfather's orders might have unsettled him, leading to a hasty, misguided move.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: In truth, I haven't thought about it, and my opinions hold little weight.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The current plan has proven effective. I believe it's wise to trust Grandfather's judgment, as I always do.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Besides, I now have more important duties to fulfill.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The shark in our midst has finally made its move.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Recently, several of our partners claimed to have found a superior seller and ended their dealings with us.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Meanwhile, Benett, our vault keeper, was reported to have embezzled and sold vault assets. It's said that he tried to flee but was killed by Tacet Discords outside the city.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I am not so sure... I've worked with Benett before. He was principled, bold but not reckless, not one to easily betray. And...
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The night he died, he sent a photo to my Terminal—a blood-stained page of an anthology, marked with three phrases. "Thy eyes guide my course in the tempest," "When forty winters siege thy beauty," and "The planet turns right, twice and a half."
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The meaning is yet to be revealed, but he is clearly conveying a message.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: All evidence points to Benett being the key to uncovering the shark lurking in our waters.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The Montelli family is a symbol of liberation for Ragunna. We uphold freedom and equality for all. Our vault is the heart of our family, and if it's corrupted, it threatens not only us, but risks plunging the city back into oppression and isolation.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: As much as I hate to suspect family members, I cannot rule any of them out.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: You, however, are different. As an outsider who has aided us in capturing the initial traitors... I hope to not be proven wrong, but I feel that I can trust you.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: My uncle's words were clear. Only those at the table can play the game. To engage with my family, one must have both standing and purpose.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: So, I offer you a new identity in our upcoming inquiry—Cat's Eye, a provisional member under my patronage.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: If you wish to join, you must undertake the final assessment and pledge your loyalty to the Montellis.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Oh, don't worry, we aren't harming anyone. It is but a subtle adaptation of the rules.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: When it comes to family matters, we like to use codenames, each tied to a unique token. Mine, for example, is Opal.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Opal recommended Cat's Eye. It has a ring to it, don't you think?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Also, have you looked closely at your own eyes? They share the same luster as Cat's Eye gems.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Now, Cat's Eye, will you stand with me to catch the traitor within our family and avert this looming threat?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: What made you say that?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Hmm, you're curious who I am beyond my role, is that it?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Hmm, I just might entertain that thought.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: But for now, my agents just sent me the address of Benett's residence. While his body has been found, what he left behind is still out there.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: It seems someone has acted faster. Those two... They're my uncle's agents, Sage and Acorn.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Yes, we address each other by codenames—handy identifiers in a crowd.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I'll keep you updated on the family members' codenames we encounter, along with any other details you might need.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Seems like they are looking for something as well.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: It's only natural my uncle wishes to retrieve the lost items... but my presence might raise a few eyebrows.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Yes, you try and loosen their lips. If memory serves, they are senior members, having served under my uncle for years. Regulars at Margherita's.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Talk business with merchants, and wine with drinkers... Engage their interests, and their words will flow like a river. As for the rest...
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: So, they found nothing, but assumed Uncle wasn't concerned?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: That makes no sense. Everything that happened recently ties back to the vault. If Uncle wished to protect his position, he'd be quick to retrieve the items and resolve the situation.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Curiously, Benett was last sighted in the vicinity of <color=yellow>Liberty Square</color>, where you met Uncle.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Last night, I was investigating the area before I happened upon your private meeting.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: But when I brought this up to him afterward, he didn't seem privy to any details.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: As for my search of Benett's home, nothing of note turned up, just as the two agents reported.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I found no spoils, not even the faintest trace of them being stored or moved... Everything about his living space fits the profile of a typical junior vault employee.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I've also asked around about Bennet after our previous collaboration. He was ambitious, but never greedy. I was even told he refused the bribe offered by a business associate during an operation.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The Montelli family is ever generous with wealth and opportunities, welcoming all who aspire to make their mark in Ragunna. Mere profit would never make him betray us.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: For now, more evidence is required. The entire matter might need to be approached from a different angle...
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Shh, hold still... See that man over there, the one that looks like a gray dove?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: After him, quick.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Nowhere to run. Now it's time for a proper chat.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: He had no choice but to run, to escape his past and sever any ties with the Montellis.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: No one knows the family's ways better than its members, even though... he is no longer one of us.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Right, Old Duncan?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I will never forget that <color=yellow>stormy</color> night, nor any of the members who were caught in it.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: You were standing across from Benett's doorway, and your clothes are still damp from the rain... You weren't simply passing by, you were watching. What were you looking for? Or should I ask, what did you hope to find?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Most people find acceptance easier than change, as change demands the bravery to face uncertainty. No great endeavor is without its perils.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: So yes, if the Montellis are to drive the change and push past current barriers, the path ahead will be anything but easy.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The family exists to withstand what an individual cannot, and accomplish what might otherwise be unattainable.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: But within the family, each Montelli still enjoys the freedom of choice. Your leaving is a testiment to this, is it not?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: If you're willing, there is still much to be done for Benett. His Terminal, the alleged stolen goods... everything but his body remains missing.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Given your familiarity, you might help us in locating these items...
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: We have little choice but to try.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Now... let's go, {PlayerName}. We're off to the most reliable source of information in Ragunna.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: This is the place.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: She may not be here, but I have my ways of reaching her people.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: In Ragunna's market, they say fortune seldom favors those who lack a taste for fine drinks.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Among traders, there's a secret <color=yellow>"code"</color> in the way drinks are mixed.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: A base of bitter almond and mint, for instance, usually signals danger and death. But some have devised their own, more private codes.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Yes. This area is essentially a neutral zone in the city. No affiliations, no restrictions.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: With the ongoing feud between Scarlet Velvet and the Montellis, finding her will be difficult. But I've heard they have eyes and ears here.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: So all that remains is to order the right drink, watch the crowd, and let their reactions lead us to Scarlet Velvet's contact.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: A Scarlet Velvet Ribbon, please.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The Order and the commoners... it must be Scarlet Velvet causing the stir.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The Order's arrogance is known, but such blatant actions... Is it because we're far from the heart of the city?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Let's first address their troubles, and then we'll have a proper talk.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Oh, please. My ties with the family are not so fragile as to be shaken by mere words.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The fact that we are having this conversation at all means that you cannot ignore my status, wouldn't you agree?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The Sentinel and the Primus have declared free trade as our undeniable right. Scarlet Velvet is always entitled to trade as they please, regardless of their previous partnerships.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: You preach the doctrine, yet fail to adhere to it yourself. If I were you, I'd be on my way to the Penitentiary. Willful transgression... is the worst blasphemy one can imagine.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: There was a slight issue of a traitor in the vault, so our hands were tied.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: A direct approach works best at times. Actually, what that Acolyte claimed is news to me. Surrendering control and ceasing trade... are not in the Montelli's vocabulary.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The Montelli creed has always been family first, and a pioneering spirit second.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I'll speak with my uncle and grandfather to see what happened with our cooperation.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: It seems Benett may have anticipated the trouble ahead.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I wonder if you might show us to the shelter? We'd be most grateful.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: You can tell someone was here, look at the mess. Perhaps Benett deliberately arranged it this way as a cover.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: We'll each use our sensors to search, then let's gather and analyze the clues we find.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Someone extracted the core data module... It's empty now.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: This must be what Benett was trying to tell us before he died. Someone with access to the vault has broken their oath and leaked the data module. Now, only Uncle, Grandfather, and I have the clearance to retrieve it.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: In Rinascita, the Order maintains control over Terminals, unlike other countries where they are freely traded. My grandfather learned to modify them during his early ventures in the New Federation.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Our lantern-type Terminal is a modified model. It may look purely ornamental, but it houses the tech modules we've developed. As Scarlet Velvet said, aside from our art dealings, we've been supplying these Terminals to Resonators at fair prices as part of our discreet business.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: By doing so, we've broken the Order's monopoly. We've given more people the means to protect themselves in their ventures, giving them choices they didn't have before.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The Order is aware of our discreet business, but they turn a blind eye as long as we don't openly challenge their authority. The hefty taxes we pay maintain this... delicate understanding.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: As a result, no family member would ever divulge our Terminal secrets, much less allow the modules to fall into the wrong hands. What exactly are you planning, Uncle?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: No, we must find the core module...
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family
If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Uncle, may I ask you something first? Before the Carnevale, the Priest showed me your pendant. How did he come by it, and what led to your capture?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Were you mistreated? Did they coerce you into doing something against your will?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I refuse.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I said I refuse! I can't act as if nothing happened. I won't let a family member die unjustly, or see our modules fall into the wrong hands.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I can't believe you just said that. So, you're refusing to tell the truth and reveal the module's location, is that it?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Then so be it.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Your course is set. As is mine. But mark my words... I will stop you, Mr. Capollo.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I'm sorry you have to see this side of our family.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Really? I just wish... No, I did promise I'd try to drop the pretense with you.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I may need more time to come to terms with all this. I don't regret uncovering the truth and exposing the traitor… I'm just saddened that my uncle is the one behind it all.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: We were meant to be the guardians of our family's ideals, to carry the torch forward. And yet, now…
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Well, wallowing in emotion won't solve anything. Our priority now is to recover the data module. Every moment it's missing puts our family at greater risk.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The core module is difficult to carry around. They must have hidden it... The dock Benett visited, used for storage... Could it be there?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: We need to adjust our strategy. My conversation with Capollo will have alerted him. He's likely to move the module sooner than expected. I need to inspect the dock for any clues.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Indeed, but time is not on our side. If Capollo acts on this, I might lose my window to secure the module. Our sole advantage now is that we're operating as a pair.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I need you to take this terminal to <color=yellow>Pierre</color> at the bank. If the dock turns out to be a dead end, we will need other leads.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I know that securing the module alone won't suffice. I must uncover Capollo's true motives...how it will affect our family. I'll figure it out, I promise.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: (Nothing so far... Was I wrong? Maybe this place doesn't hold what we were looking for? Why did Benett come here, then?)
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: (Or am I too late... Did Capollo get here first?)
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: (And the energy fluctuation... it was going off and on... No, I couldn't have been imagining it.)
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: (Such a big mirror... Why is it here?)
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: (It doesn't seem to be made of common glass, but some kind of crystallized energy... Oh.)
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: (Will I find the data module on the other side...)
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: (Or was all this just a trap...)
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I see... so Duncan was in the dark about the real cause of Benett's death. He simply wanted to protect his friend's reputation, and Capollo used that.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Duncan gave us a rigged Terminal to cover Benett's "debt", clearing his name.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Capollo <color=yellow>couldn't have tampered</color> with the Terminal data himself, or he would have found the information hidden beneath the overwrites. He simply laid a trap at <color=yellow>the dock that Benett visited</color>.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I can empathize with Duncan, even to some extent Capollo. They are driven by a desire for safety and stability—a tempting future even for me.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: But we will never achieve that by surrendering ourselves to the Order.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: From the very beginning, our paths diverged. To yield to them now means giving up even more, and once we lose our grip, we'll no longer have the luxury of refusal.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Grandfather and the others have already paved the way. I will follow their lead and chart a course towards a brighter tomorrow. For our family, and all of Ragunna.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Wealth and power will safeguard our freedom, while freedom, in turn, will nurture wealth and power.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The Montelli family is set to break the Order's suffocating hold and lead Ragunna towards a wider horizon—embracing Septimont, Huanglong, and other countries. And through it all, we will never forget who we are.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The family exists to accomplish what one cannot and withstand the winds of fate. This is the future I envision for the Montellis.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Like I said, we seize control.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: An all-out war with the Order isn't a wise move. Rather than blindly tailing Capollo in search of a hidden data module, let's take control and have him come to us.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Scarlet Velvet mentioned they need a formal reply, and we can deliver that.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: {PlayerName}, care to help me give them an unforgettable response in two days?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The rain's back. I remember telling Grandfather how I hated the rainy season.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I once saw rain as a bad omen in Ragunna.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: When it rains, it's easier to wash away blood stains. That's why acts of revenge usually happen on such days.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: But today's rain feels different. As it falls, the troubles of yesterday are washed away. I feel calm, like I've found my true self again. My present and my future are now in my own hands.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: What he just said... Looks like someone has been keeping secrets from me, huh?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I've been curious, you entered that Sonoro and delivered his gun to me. How did you earn my grandfather's trust so soon?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Hm, the nerve... Fine, since we make such a good team, I'll let it slide for now.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I see. I'll take care of the rest.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: But before that...
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Yes. What, miss me already?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: "No need to feel sad about parting, for each goodbye brings us closer to the next hello."
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: That's my favorite way to think of it—a countdown to our next reunion.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: With Capollo ousted, the family needs someone to fill his shoes. I must assist my grandfather through this tumultuous transition. There is no one else to do it.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Thank you, {PlayerName}. As my grandfather said, things couldn't have gone so smoothly without your help and support.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Now that the dust has settled, you no longer need to stay with me as Cat's Eye of the Montelli family, but still... I want you to have this.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: As I said, every member gets a token that matches their codename.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Though you already have a pair of Cat's Eyes, please accept this as a token of my appreciation. No, this gem wasn't crafted by my Forte. I chose it just for you.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I know someone like you won't stay just for me, and joining the Montelli family might not be in your plans just yet.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: But I'll keep this codename for you, Cat's Eye—the first and only member to receive my personal invitation.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: What matter of intrigue brought you and {PlayerName} together at this hour, Uncle? A table... are we speaking of a splendid card game, then?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Pity. I didn't think you'd pull {Male=him;Female=her} aside for a private word, especially after all Rover and I have been through together.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: But since you've finished, would you excuse us now?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Meet me at the <color=yellow>rendezvous</color>. Beware the "eyes."
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I understand, Uncle. I've never forgotten where my privileges come from, nor will I covet what's not mine.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The Black Shores, the Carnevale... my sole principle is whether they benefit the Montellis.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I will execute any command that strengthens the family, and crush any threats to our standing.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Uncle, about Benett... have you heard?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Not at all, I just happened to overhear someone talking about it in passing...
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Someone extracted the core data module... It's empty now.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: This must be what Benett was trying to tell us before he died. Someone with access to the vault has broken their oath and leaked the data module. Now, only Uncle, Grandfather, and I have the clearance to retrieve it.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: By doing so, we've broken the Order's monopoly. We've given more people the means to protect themselves in their ventures, giving them choices they didn't have before.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The Order is aware of our discreet business, but they turn a blind eye as long as we don't openly challenge their authority. The hefty taxes we pay maintain this... delicate understanding.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: As a result, no family member would ever divulge our Terminal secrets, much less allow the modules to fall into the wrong hands. What exactly are you planning, Uncle?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: No, we must find the core module...
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family
If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Were you mistreated? Did they coerce you into doing something against your will?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I refuse.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I said I refuse! I can't act as if nothing happened. I won't let a family member die unjustly, or see our modules fall into the wrong hands.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Then so be it.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: We were meant to be the guardians of our family's ideals, to carry the torch forward. And yet, now…
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Well, wallowing in emotion won't solve anything. Our priority now is to recover the data module. Every moment it's missing puts our family at greater risk.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The core module is difficult to carry around. They must have hidden it... The dock Benett visited, used for storage... Could it be there?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Indeed, but time is not on our side. If Capollo acts on this, I might lose my window to secure the module. Our sole advantage now is that we're operating as a pair.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I need you to take this terminal to <color=yellow>Pierre</color> at the bank. If the dock turns out to be a dead end, we will need other leads.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I know that securing the module alone won't suffice. I must uncover Capollo's true motives...how it will affect our family. I'll figure it out, I promise.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The rain's back. I remember telling Grandfather how I hated the rainy season.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I once saw rain as a bad omen in Ragunna.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: When it rains, it's easier to wash away blood stains. That's why acts of revenge usually happen on such days.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: What he just said... Looks like someone has been keeping secrets from me, huh?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I've been curious, you entered that Sonoro and delivered his gun to me. How did you earn my grandfather's trust so soon?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Hm, the nerve... Fine, since we make such a good team, I'll let it slide for now.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I see. I'll take care of the rest.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: But before that...
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Yes. What, miss me already?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: "No need to feel sad about parting, for each goodbye brings us closer to the next hello."
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: That's my favorite way to think of it—a countdown to our next reunion.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: With Capollo ousted, the family needs someone to fill his shoes. I must assist my grandfather through this tumultuous transition. There is no one else to do it.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Thank you, {PlayerName}. As my grandfather said, things couldn't have gone so smoothly without your help and support.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Now that the dust has settled, you no longer need to stay with me as Cat's Eye of the Montelli family, but still... I want you to have this.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: As I said, every member gets a token that matches their codename.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Though you already have a pair of Cat's Eyes, please accept this as a token of my appreciation. No, this gem wasn't crafted by my Forte. I chose it just for you.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I know someone like you won't stay just for me, and joining the Montelli family might not be in your plans just yet.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: But I'll keep this codename for you, Cat's Eye—the first and only member to receive my personal invitation.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: What did you mean by Daemons?
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: You really must adore that song. I remember hearing you sing it when I was little.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: When I was a child, whenever I passed by Ciaccona's house, I'd always hear music drifting from the courtyard. Lively, spirited and so full of emotion...
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Back then Ciaccona's family conducted the Order's choir.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Ahem, can we discuss restaurant etiquette later?
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Don't worry. This won't be the first time we've crossed paths with the Order.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Then you...
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: It's risky, but there's no surer way to find out, wouldn't you agree, {PlayerName}?
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: A splendid retaliation. I witnessed all of your performance!
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Like everyone present, I too eagerly anticipate tomorrow's arrival.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: As expected, the Order's fingerprints are all over it. According to our inside sources...
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: It was none other than Acolytes from the Order who salvaged the poets' lost works from the wreckage. They've long known of their existence and hid the poems in the Order's library.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: It's possible this was a sham all along. Choosing to make it public now likely means they're using those poems to obscure the real truth.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Now, considering the fact that the untraceable article first began circulating among poets, musicians, and playwrights alike...
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: I think it's fair to say its author is a regular of such secret circles. He may even be the Resonator we've speculated about.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: His collusion with the Order is why these rumors are allowed to run rampant in the streets.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: I'll have someone follow this secret circle's trail and see what we can find.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: We should also share these findings with Ciaccona. As a poet, her insights would be much appreciated.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: ...Just like when we were children. Gone without a trace.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: When she and her family disappeared without even a goodbye.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Ms. Margherita, have you seen Ciaccona?
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Thank you for letting us know, Ms. Margherita.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: If the poets' resentful souls gave birth to Daemons, then shouldn't they sound like the poets themselves?
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Those voices were just people who read or heard their work...
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: {PlayerName}, fancy running into you here.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Won't you dine with me? Ms. Margherita asked me to sample her newest pizza, but my goodness, these portions...
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Shh, that name is not to be spoken of in Ragunna.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Simply put, the Golden Anthem was once a renowned Poets Society.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Their three members were once the Sentinel's cantors, but the Order banished them for insulting the Divinity.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Allegedly, their Pilgrim's Sail caught fire and none on board survived, and thus their last known work disappeared.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: In her world, poetry and music hold equal sway... Shh, listen carefully...
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Follow the song to find her!
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: "Like the fire that dragged them to hell, these Daemons will spread throughout the land and burn all of Ragunna."
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Unverifiable, yes, but not entirely dismissible. That said, a peculiar entity did indeed manifest, and it attacked you.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: So, let's start at the very beginning. I have a friend who's an expert in deciphering music. I believe you've met her before...
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: She who resembles Topaz should still be near Whisperwind Haven at this hour.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Our enemy hides in the dark, while we remain in the light. If that's the case...
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: We need to split up. With your tenacity and Ciaccona's expertise, we will uncover the truth.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Someone has pointed a gun at Cat's Eye. Someone ought to pull back the curtain and expose them.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: The family has its ways. Tracing the article's source and finding this mastermind won't be a problem.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither
